Issues: Lack of commercial complexity: The image is extremely simple and abstract, which limits its appeal for broad commercial sale or high-end graphic design. It lacks the intricate detail or complex composition usually required for high sales viability.
Low perceived value: As a basic graphic, it offers minimal unique selling points. It could be easily replicated by many artists, leading to low commercial appeal.
Lack of technical depth: While the rendering is clean, there is very little technical skill demonstrated beyond simple shapes and color blocking. It doesn't establish a unique artistic voice.
